channel.title: GitHub Classic ASP Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Classic ASP in GitHub

item.title: willread/Sprung
item.description: Jetpack-powered platform game in outer space, my April 2013 One Game A Month entry

item.title: ricardperez/Momino
item.description: Momino is a platforms game developed with Unity3d in order to learn this platform.

item.title: niallryan/WAD_Project
item.description: Customer/Stock Management Tool created in ASP.NET with Visual Studio for Web Application Development Module of H.Dip. in Web Technologies, NCI, 2013.
